title: Galantos Guard
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Galantos Guard''' was the primary naval defense force of the [[Fian/Legends|Fia]] species and their homeworld of [[Galantos]]. It was originally created to protect Galantos against the [[Yevetha]] during the [[Black Fleet Crisis]] from [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]]–[[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]].

During the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], in exchange for what the Galantos believed to be protection from the extragalactic invaders, they informed the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] of the brutal Yevetha and the threat they might pose. Taking heed, the Yuuzhan Vong invaded the [[N'zoth system/Legends|N'zoth system]].

The details of the battle may never be known, but if the Yevethan and Yuuzhan Vong tactics say anything, the Yuuzhan Vong destroyed every single ship in the system, and unleashed a horrible orbital bombardment on N'zoth that rendered the planet a molten wasteland. At the end of the conflict the Yevetha were either extinct or severely endangered.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic I: Remnant]]''

*<!-- 2005-10-25 -->''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''
